prompt: A narrow, dimly lit corridor stretches forward, its concrete floor cracked and broken, with patches of green weeds pushing through the fissures. The walls, once smooth and painted a pale gray, are now heavily damaged, with large sections of paint peeling away to reveal the rough, weathered surface beneath. Along both sides of the passage, rusted metal railings stand at intervals, their once-bright finish now faded and corroded. At the far end, a set of stairs ascends into the gloom, flanked by a simple, unadorned door. A single, old-fashioned arcade machine stands abandoned on the left, its screen dark and its buttons worn. The ceiling is lined with fluorescent lights, their glow casting a cold, pale light that barely penetrates the shadows pooling in the corners and along the damaged walls. The overall atmosphere is one of quiet decay and abandonment, as if the place has been forgotten for a long time.
